a✝ b✝ c✝ d a b c : α
⊢ a - b - c ≤ a - (b + c)

b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
⊢ Integrable (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑x ^ 2)) volume

case left
b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
⊢ AEStronglyMeasurable (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑x ^ 2)) volume

case right
b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑x ^ 2)) volume

b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
⊢ Integrable (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑(x ^ 2))) volume

case pos
b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
hb' : b = 0
⊢ Integrable (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑x ^ 2)) volume

case neg
b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
hb' : ¬b = 0
⊢ Integrable (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑x ^ 2)) volume

case right
b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑x ^ 2)) volume

case left
b : ℂ
hb : 0 < b.re
⊢ AEStronglyMeasurable (fun x => ↑x * cexp (-b * ↑x ^ 2)) volume
